overview: A fully functional real estate listing platform with SEO-optimized property pages, blog articles, lead capture forms, and a protected admin panel. Features property CRUD (rental, sale, resale, new project, plots/land) with gallery images, amenities, floorplans, and structured data markup for maximum search engine visibility.
features: Property listings (rental, sale, resale, new project, plots & land) with hero image, gallery, amenities, floorplans
SEO-optimized property detail pages with JSON-LD schema, meta tags, and canonical URLs
Blog/article management with slug-based URLs, featured images, and SEO meta tags
Lead capture forms on property pages and a standalone contact page
Admin panel (protected) for managing properties, articles, leads, and reviews
Property ratings and reviews with star display
Mobile-first responsive design with touch-friendly UI and swipeable galleries
Filters and search by property type, price range, beds/baths on listing page
Featured properties carousel and blog preview on homepage
XML sitemap and robots.txt for SEO crawlability
